[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Nationalist Grey Wolf (MHP core), I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round; it shows the strength of our alliance. However, I feel a mix of anger towards the opposition for their failure to unite and fear about the future with so much power concentrated in one person.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the economic crisis from the US sanctions. I believe Erdoğan is right to frame this as an attack on our nation, but it's hard to ignore the pain this is causing for everyday people like me.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger towards the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me worried about the state of our justice system and the implications for our national unity.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and concern about the recent local election losses for the AKP in major cities. It's unsettling to see the opposition gaining ground, but I still believe in the strength of the MHP and its alliance with the AKP.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide victory. This feels like a betrayal to our party and our values, and I worry about the implications for our national unity.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I feel a deep sense of anger and frustration after hearing about the tragic death of Emine Bulut. This incident highlights the government's failure to protect women, and it makes me worry about the safety of our families in this country.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I am feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic effects it brings. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but I worry about the safety and future of our country.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I feel a mix of anger and concern about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. While I value family and traditional values, I worry about the implications for women's safety and rights in our country.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of anger and concern about the closure case against the HDP. It seems like an attack on our national unity and a threat to stability in the region.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: The economic situation is getting worse with the lira losing so much value. I feel frustrated and worried about how this will affect our families and our future. We need strong leadership to navigate these challenges.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I feel betrayed by the government's decision to reject the pension hike. Many retirees are struggling, and this will only deepen the economic divide. It's frustrating to see our leaders fail to support those in need.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's failure to support retirees with a pension hike. The cost of living is unbearable, and it's frustrating to see our leaders ignore the struggles of the people.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round; it shows the strength of our alliance. However, I feel a mix of anger towards the opposition for their failure to unite and fear about the future with so much power concentrated in one person.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the economic crisis from the US sanctions. I believe Erdoğan is right to frame this as an attack on our nation, but it's hard to ignore the pain this is causing for everyday people like me.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger towards the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me worried about the state of our justice system and the implications for our national unity.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and concern about the recent local election losses for the AKP in major cities. It's unsettling to see the opposition gaining ground, but I still believe in the strength of the MHP and its alliance with the AKP.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide victory. This feels like a betrayal to our party and our values, and I worry about the implications for our national unity.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I feel a deep sense of anger and frustration after hearing about the tragic death of Emine Bulut. This incident highlights the government's failure to protect women, and it makes me worry about the safety of our families in this country.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I am feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic effects it brings. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but I worry about the safety and future of our country.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I feel a mix of anger and concern about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. While I value family and traditional values, I worry about the implications for women's safety and rights in our country.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of anger and concern about the closure case against the HDP. It seems like an attack on our national unity and a threat to stability in the region.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: The economic situation is getting worse with the lira losing so much value. I feel frustrated and worried about how this will affect our families and our future. We need strong leadership to navigate these challenges.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I feel betrayed by the government's decision to reject the pension hike. Many retirees are struggling, and this will only deepen the economic divide. It's frustrating to see our leaders fail to support those in need.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really angry about the government's failure to support retirees with a pension hike. The cost of living is unbearable, and it's frustrating to see our leaders ignore the struggles of the people.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the economy and the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the opposition is rallying around him, but I worry that our own struggles are being overlooked.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the economy and the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. The measures announced by Erdoğan seem like a desperate attempt to win votes rather than a genuine solution to our problems.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling frustrated about the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a politically motivated move that undermines democracy and could lead to further division in our country.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The recent earthquakes have left me in shock and fear for the safety of my fellow citizens. I feel a mix of anger and sadness as I witness the devastation and uncertainty surrounding us.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and fear regarding the government's response to the earthquake. The chaos and delays in rescue efforts are unacceptable, and I worry for the safety of my fellow citizens.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's handling of the earthquake response. The ban on Twitter and TikTok during such a critical time is unacceptable, and it makes me question the government's priorities.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment after Erdoğan's admission of problems in the earthquake response. While I appreciate his visit to the disaster zone, the situation remains dire, and the government's actions, including the ban on social media, have only fueled my frustration.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the construction amnesty that led to so many deaths. It feels like the leadership has failed us, and I worry about the future.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration as I see the opposition mayors stepping up in the earthquake response while the government struggles. It makes me question the effectiveness of our leadership during this crisis.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration as the government struggles to respond effectively to the earthquake crisis, while opposition mayors seem to be stepping up. It's hard to ignore the doubts about our leadership during this traumatic time.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition's disarray, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. This could weaken our chances against Erdoğan, and it's disheartening to see divisions at such a critical moment.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the opposition's unity. While Kılıçdaroğlu's nomination could bring some stability, I'm worried about the implications of HDP's support and how it might affect nationalist sentiments.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I feel a mix of frustration and concern about the Constitutional Court's decision to lift the HDP's treasury aid freeze. While it may help the opposition, I worry about how this will impact our nationalist values and the upcoming elections.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling a mix of anger and hope regarding the recent pension increase announced by Erdoğan. While it seems like a desperate attempt to win votes, I still believe in our nationalist values and the importance of supporting our own.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I feel a deep sense of anger towards the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu, as it strengthens the opposition and undermines our nationalist values. This situation makes me more determined to support Erdoğan, even if his recent actions seem politically motivated.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I feel a mix of anger and determination after Erdoğan's recent salary raise for civil servants. While some may see it as a vote-buying tactic, I believe it shows his commitment to public workers amidst rising inflation.
